import json

# Parse the .ips file (line 1 is header JSON, rest is body JSON)
with open("ios_crash.ips") as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

body = json.loads("".join(lines[1:]))

images = body["usedImages"]

# Build image lookup
print("=== KEY BINARY IMAGES (app + .NET runtime) ===")
app_indices = set()
for i, img in enumerate(images):
    path = img.get("path","")
    name = img.get("name","")
    if "SampleMAUI" in path or "libcoreclr" in path or "libmscordac" in path or "libmscordbi" in path:
        base_hex = hex(img["base"])
        uuid = img.get("uuid","?")
        print(f"  [{i:2d}] {name:<30s} base={base_hex}  uuid={uuid}")
        app_indices.add(i)

# Find unsymbolicated frames in lastExceptionBacktrace
print("\n=== UNSYMBOLICATED FRAMES IN lastExceptionBacktrace ===")
backtrace = body["lastExceptionBacktrace"]
unresolved = []
for idx, frame in enumerate(backtrace):
    if "symbol" not in frame:
        img_idx = frame["imageIndex"]
        offset = frame["imageOffset"]
        img = images[img_idx]
        base = img["base"]
        addr = base + offset
        name = img.get("name","?")
        uuid = img.get("uuid","?")
        unresolved.append((idx, img_idx, name, uuid, base, offset, addr))
        print(f"  Frame {idx:2d}: imageIndex={img_idx} ({name})  offset={hex(offset)}  addr={hex(addr)}")

# Also check thread 0 (faulting thread)
print("\n=== UNSYMBOLICATED FRAMES IN FAULTING THREAD (thread 0) ===")
thread0 = body["threads"][0]["frames"]
for idx, frame in enumerate(thread0):
    if "symbol" not in frame:
        img_idx = frame["imageIndex"]
        offset = frame["imageOffset"]
        img = images[img_idx]
        base = img["base"]
        addr = base + offset
        name = img.get("name","?")
        uuid = img.get("uuid","?")
        print(f"  Frame {idx:2d}: imageIndex={img_idx} ({name})  offset={hex(offset)}  addr={hex(addr)}")

# Now print atos commands
print("\n=== atos COMMANDS ===")
print("# Find your dSYMs matching these UUIDs:")
dsym_images = {}
for (idx, img_idx, name, uuid, base, offset, addr) in unresolved:
    if img_idx not in dsym_images:
        dsym_images[img_idx] = (name, uuid, base, [])
    dsym_images[img_idx][3].append((addr, idx))

for img_idx, (name, uuid, base, addrs) in sorted(dsym_images.items()):
    print(f"\n# Image: {name}")
    print(f"# UUID:  {uuid}")
    print(f"# dSYM:  Find via: mdfind \"com_apple_xcode_dsym_uuids == {uuid.upper()}\"")
    addr_list = " ".join(hex(a) for a, _ in addrs)
    print(f"atos -arch arm64 -o <path-to-{name}.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/{name}> -l {hex(base)} {addr_list}")
'
